sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: RTX 2025년 3분기 매출 225억 달러, 신규 수주 370억 달러로 연간 가이던스 상향

keyPoints.text: 3분기 매출이 225억 달러로 전년 대비 12%(유기적 13%) 증가하며 견조한 운영 성과를 냈다.
분기 중 370억 달러의 신규 수주를 확보하면서 수주잔고가 2,510억 달러로 늘었다.
호실적을 바탕으로 2025년 조정 매출을 최대 870억 달러, 조정 EPS를 최대 6.20달러로 상향했다.

businessChanges.text: 세 개 사업부문 전반에서 두 자릿수 유기적 매출 성장과 함께 조정 세그먼트 마진 개선을 이어갔다.

watchItems.text: 상향된 2025년 조정 매출·EPS 가이던스의 달성 여부를 지켜봐야 한다.
370억 달러 규모 신규 수주가 향후 매출로 전환되는 속도를 확인할 필요가 있다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: RTX Reports Q3 2025 Results RTX delivers 12% sales growth with strong operational performance; Raises 2025 outlook for adjusted sales* and adjusted EPS*, confirms free cash flow* ARLINGTON, Va., October 21, 2025 – RTX (NYSE: RTX) reports third quarter 2025 results. Third quarter 2025 • Sales of $22.5 billion, up 12 percent versus prior year, and up 13 percent organically* excluding divestitures • GAAP EPS of $1.41, including $0.29 of acquisition accounting adjustments, $0.01 cent of restructuring, and a $0.01 benefit from other net significant and/or no n-recurring items • Adjusted EPS* of $1.70 , up 17 percent versus prior year • Operating ca  Normalized numeric aliases: $22.5 billion = 225억 달러; $4.6 billion = 46억 달러; $4.0 billion = 40억 달러; $251 billion = 2,510억 달러; $148 billion = 1,480억 달러; $103 billion = 1,030억 달러; $0.9 billion = 9억 달러; $2.9 billion = 29억 달러; $1.41 = 1.41달러; $4.0 = 4.0달러; $2.9 = 2.9달러; $103 = 103달러; $0.9 = 0.9달러; 12 percent = 12%; 13 percent = 13%; 17 percent = 17%.

leted the divestiture of Collins’ actuation and flight control business Updates outlook for full year 2025 • Adjusted sales* of $86.5 - $87.0 billion, up from $84.75 - $85.5 billion • Organic sales growth* of 8 to 9 percent, up from 6 to 7 percent • Adjusted EPS* of $6.10 - $6.20, up from $5.80 - $5.95 • Confirms free cash flow* of $7.0 - $7.5 billion “Strong execution in the third quarter enabled us to deliver double-digit organic sales growth* across all three segments and our sixth consecutive quarter of year-over-year adjusted segment margin expansion*,” said RTX Chairman and CEO Chris Calio. “We also received $37 billion of new awards in the quarter, reflecting robust global demand for our p  Normalized numeric aliases: $87.0 billion = 870억 달러; $85.5 billion = 855억 달러; $7.5 billion = 75억 달러; $37 billion = 370억 달러; $86.5 = 86.5달러; $87.0 = 87.0달러; $84.75 = 84.75달러; $85.5 = 85.5달러; $6.20 = 6.20달러; $37 = 37달러; $5.95 = 5.95달러; $7.0 = 7.0달러; $7.5 = 7.5달러; 9 percent = 9%; 7 percent = 7%.
